calendar.matters:
Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar May-28-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Shannon B. Jones, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Teachers Insurance and Annuity Association of America.
Jonathan Matsoukis, Property Manager for plaintiff, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Lion Capital Management LLC.
Amended default was entered against defendant on March 6, 2008.
Doe defendants were dismissed on March 6, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Teachers Insurance and Annuity Association of America, and against the Defaulted Defendant Lion Capital Management LLC as follows:

Damages/Principal - $106,265.79.
Attorney Fees - $18,867.50.
Statutory Damages - UD - $600.00.
Costs - $878.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $126,611.29.

Additionally, plaintiff Teachers Insurance and Annuity Association of America is entitled to restitution and possession of the subject premises located at 88 Kearny Street, Suite 1450, San Francisco, CA 94108. The lease is forfeited.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
